description: Review the Public Records Request SOP document at /home/ga/Documents/records_request_sop_draft.docx, which contains tracked changes and comments from Maria Santos and James Park. Finalize the document by accepting changes for 'written or electronic request', '5 business days', the inserted fee sentence, 'mail, email, or in-person pickup', and 'designated Records Officer'. Reject changes regarding the deletion of the ORS exemption sentence, the change to 'may acknowledge', the deletion of the Appeal Process paragraph, and the change to '30 business days'. Delete all comments and save the finalized clean document to /home/ga/Documents/records_request_sop_final.docx.

required_text: Fees for electronic copies shall not exceed
Records exempt under ORS 192.345 through 192.505 shall not be disclosed
Any person denied access to a public record
